company.name: Novo Nordisk A/S
company.subtitle: GLP-1 franchise (Ozempic+Wegovy DKK 206B 2025) | CagriSema NDA filed | Mim8 BLA H2 2026 PDUFA | Ziltivekimab ZEUS H2 2026 | Self-funding

market.notes: Wegovy 2.4mg subq weekly approved Jun-2021; oral 25mg approved Dec-22-2025 (US first oral GLP-1 for obesity). 2025 sales DKK 79.1B (~$11.4B). Faces tirzepatide (LLY Zepbound) competition: SURMOUNT-5 head-to-head showed tirz ~47% greater weight loss vs sema. Compounded GLP-1s eroded share 2024 (FDA shortage de-listed Feb-2025). 2026 guidance reflects pricing pressure + slower obesity growth.

us.reachPct.note: Wegovy 2.4mg subq + oral 25mg; ~3M US Wegovy patients on therapy 2025 / ~110M obese eligible = ~3% peak; oral launch Jan 2026 expected to extend reach to ~4% by 2027.

us.priceK.note: $14K/yr Wegovy WAC ~$1349/month; net ~50% rebated post commercial coverage.

us.wtpPct.note: 35% -- Medicare excludes weight-loss (Part D statute); commercial expanding post-SELECT CV outcomes; PA + step edits common.

eu.reachPct.note: 1.5% -- EU launches uneven; UK NHS access gated by BMI ≥35 + comorbidities; private market dominant.

eu.wtpPct.note: 22% -- HTA cautious; AMNOG/NICE limit reimbursement to BMI ≥35; out-of-pocket dominant.

row.reachPct.note: 0.3% -- semaglutide LOE in China/Brazil/Canada 2026 erodes branded share; APAC/LATAM private market only.

row.wtpPct.note: 8% -- Japan PMDA approved 2026 BMI ≥35; emerging markets self-pay.

market.notes: Ozempic 0.5/1.0/2.0mg subq weekly approved 2017; SUSTAIN trials. 2025 sales DKK 127.1B (~$18.3B), +6%/+10% CER. SELECT CV outcomes positive 2023 expanded label. Semaglutide composition-of-matter LOE China/Brazil/Canada 2026 (already flagged in 2026 guidance cut). US LOE 2031-2032; EU 2031.

us.reachPct.note: Ozempic ~5% reach of ~36M US T2D; mature class growing slower; tirzepatide competition limits incremental share.

us.priceK.note: $11K/yr WAC Ozempic; net ~50% post Medicare/commercial rebate; 340B/PBM erosion.

us.wtpPct.note: 60% -- Medicare/Medicaid cover GLP-1 for T2D widely; PA on weight-related criteria.

eu.reachPct.note: 2.5% -- EU5 + UK; T2D class branded penetration ~25% of branded GLP-1 universe.

eu.wtpPct.note: 50% -- HTA covers GLP-1 second-line T2D; AMNOG-discounted.

row.reachPct.note: 0.4% -- China LOE 2026 erodes branded; Japan + Australia growing.

row.wtpPct.note: 18% -- Japan + AU reimbursed; emerging markets generic-bound post-LOE.

market.notes: Oral semaglutide tablet (3/7/14mg). 2025 sales DKK 22.1B (~$3.2B), -5% as oral Wegovy obesity launch (Jan 2026) cannibalizes Rybelsus T2D. Approved 2019.

us.reachPct.note: Rybelsus ~1% reach of US T2D; declining post oral Wegovy launch.

us.priceK.note: $11K/yr WAC parity with Ozempic; net ~50% rebated.

us.wtpPct.note: 50% -- broad T2D coverage; same step-edit profile as Ozempic.

market.notes: Daily liraglutide for obesity (2014); ~$1.4B peak. 2025 sales DKK 3.2B (~$470M), -53% as Wegovy + tirzepatide cannibalize. Tail product.

us.reachPct.note: Saxenda ~0.2% reach -- legacy daily injection, Wegovy cannibalization.

market.notes: Long-acting Tresiba (degludec) + Levemir + Awiqli (icodec weekly basal, EU/JP/CA approved; FDA CRL 2024) + rapid-acting NovoRapid/Novolog/Fiasp + premix Ryzodeg/Xultophy. Mature class with biosimilar pressure (Semglee, Rezvoglar) + tirzepatide displacing basal in T2D. ~$5B 2025 NVO insulin total. IcoSema (icodec+sema weekly) filed.

us.reachPct.note: NVO ~30% US insulin market share / ~7M insulin users / 36M T2D = ~1.5% reach of T2D pool; Lantus + biosim erode steady.

us.priceK.note: $4K/yr blended -- Tresiba $4.5K, Awiqli premium ~$5K, NovoRapid $3.5K post Insulin price reform 2024.

us.wtpPct.note: 70% -- universal coverage; insulin price cap $35/mo Medicare; commercial varies.

eu.reachPct.note: 1.0% -- EU insulin biosim penetration high; NVO branded share ~25%.

row.reachPct.note: 0.3% -- China + India insulin biosim dominant; LATAM private market.

market.notes: NovoSeven (rFVIIa for hemophilia w/ inhibitors + congenital FVII deficiency) ~$1B; Esperoct (BAX855/N8-GP recombinant FVIII) + Refixia/Rebinyn (Factor IX) + Novoeight + Concizumab (Alhemo, anti-TFPI for hem A/B w/ inhibitors). 2025 ~DKK 12B (~$1.7B), -5%. Hemlibra cannibalizing FVIII concentrates; Mim8 (next-gen Novo) will eventually replace Esperoct.

us.reachPct.note: Novo ~25% US hemophilia A market share via Esperoct; declining post-Hemlibra; concizumab small inhibitor niche.

us.priceK.note: $280K/yr WAC blended -- Esperoct ~$300K, NovoSeven episodic ~$500K, concizumab ~$240K.

row.reachPct.note: 4% -- China/India growing branded access; otherwise plasma-derived dominant.

market.notes: Norditropin daily somatropin (peds + adult GHD, Turner, Noonan, ISS) + Sogroya (somapacitan, weekly long-acting somatropin). 2025 DKK 5.96B (~$860M), +19% driven by Sogroya growth + adult GHD. Skytrofa (Ascendis lonapegsomatropin weekly) competition.

us.reachPct.note: Norditropin ~30% US GHD share + Sogroya ramping; combined ~18% reach of 50K US GHD.

us.wtpPct.note: 65% -- specialty pharmacy + commercial coverage; PA on growth response.

market.notes: Cagrilintide (long-acting amylin analog) + semaglutide subq weekly. REDEFINE-1 Ph3 22.7% mean weight loss (vs 25% bull-case → stock dropped Dec 2024). NDA filed Q4 2025; FDA action H2 2026 (PDUFA). REDEFINE-3 CV outcomes ongoing. Positions vs LLY tirzepatide + retatrutide. First GLP-1 + amylin co-agonist if approved.

us.reachPct.note: CagriSema launches 2027 if approved; lower-tier vs Wegovy + tirzepatide given REDEFINE missed bull case; ~1.5% peak reach of US obese pool.

us.priceK.note: $16K/yr WAC modeled -- premium to Wegovy ($14K) given combo + amylin.

us.wtpPct.note: 35% -- payors require BMI/comorbidity criteria; head-to-head vs Wegovy preferred without superiority.

eu.reachPct.note: 0.6% -- EU launches gated by HTA + tirzepatide competition.

row.reachPct.note: 0.1% -- semaglutide LOE 2026 in China makes branded combo less competitive.

market.notes: Single-molecule dual GLP-1 + amylin agonist (vs CagriSema's two molecules). Subq + oral formulations. Phase 2 oral 14.5% weight loss at 36w; T2D Ph2 1.8% A1c reduction. Phase 3 obesity + T2D launching early 2026. Considered the key pipeline asset post-CagriSema; differentiation = single molecule + oral path.

us.reachPct.note: Amycretin 2029+ launch; single molecule + oral could drive 3% reach of US obese pool by peak.

us.wtpPct.note: 38% -- next-gen GLP-1 access; H2H data needed for premium.

market.notes: Amycretin T2D Ph3 starting 2026. ~1.8% A1c reduction in Ph2 -- competitive with semaglutide.

FVIIIa-mimetic bispecific antibody; subq monthly/biweekly/weekly options. Direct competitor to Roche Hemlibra ($5.5B 2024). FRONTIER 2/3/4 Ph3 program positive. BLA submitted FDA Sep 2025, EU + JP filed. PDUFA H2 2026.

us.reachPct.note: Mim8 captures 12% of 20K US hemophilia A pool by 2030; Hemlibra ~50% incumbent share, gradual switch on monthly dosing convenience.

us.priceK.note: $320K/yr WAC -- Hemlibra parity (~$350K WAC); subq monthly differentiation.

us.wtpPct.note: 70% -- well-covered specialty class; payors accept subq prophylaxis.

market.notes: Anti-IL-6 monoclonal antibody. Phase 3 ZEUS in atherosclerotic CVD with elevated CRP + Stage 3-4 CKD. Readout H2 2026. If positive, opens novel CV inflammation category (canakinumab CANTOS proved POC but never approved). High-risk binary; high-reward if MACE/HF benefit clear.

us.reachPct.note: Ziltivekimab launches 2028+ if positive; 4% reach of 800K US addressable (CKD+CV+highCRP); cardiology + nephrology specialty.

us.wtpPct.note: 30% -- payors require novel category establishment + outcome data.

mega_bear.narrative: Semaglutide patent cliff 2031 + tirzepatide dominance + LOE basket cascade + pipeline misses
events: X Wegovy share drops to <30% as LLY tirzepatide + retatrutide dominate (SURMOUNT-5 +47% benefit confirmed)
X 2026 LOE basket (Canada Apr-2026, China, Brazil) erodes faster than expected -- precedent for US
X 2031-2032 US semaglutide LOE: peptide biosimilar penetration 40-50% wipes ~$10B/yr from US franchise
X CagriSema FDA delays / label restrictions; Mim8 slow vs Hemlibra
X Ziltivekimab ZEUS misses, no CV inflammation expansion
-> Commercial run-rate drops DKK 306B (2025) -> DKK 210B (2032 post-cliff); stock to DKK ~210 (cash + insulin/GH floor)

bear.narrative: Slow GLP-1 erosion + amycretin Ph3 mixed + Mim8 OK but slow ramp
events: ~ Wegovy holds ~40% share post-tirzepatide head-to-head
~ CagriSema approved but slower launch than expected
~ Amycretin Ph3 obesity OK; T2D mixed
~ Mim8 approved but Hemlibra incumbency limits
~ Ziltivekimab modest ZEUS hit

base.narrative: GLP-1 franchise stabilizes + CagriSema launches + amycretin Ph3 positive + Mim8 ramps + ZEUS hit
events: V Wegovy + oral Wegovy hold ~45% obesity share
V CagriSema approved 2026; $3-5B by 2030
V Amycretin Ph3 obesity + T2D positive
V Mim8 approved + ramps vs Hemlibra
V Ziltivekimab ZEUS positive — opens new CV inflammation class

bull.narrative: GLP-1 expansion (CV/HF/MASH/Alzheimer's) + amycretin oral wins + Mim8 displaces Hemlibra + ZEUS strong
events: V Wegovy MASH + Alzheimer + HF labels expand TAM
V Amycretin oral validated as next-gen standard
V CagriSema $5-8B peak via T2D + obesity dual indication
V Mim8 captures 25%+ hemophilia A share via monthly dosing
V Ziltivekimab ZEUS strong → CV inflammation class established

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Obesity drug class becomes biggest in pharma history + Novo platform leadership + multi-indication GLP-1
events: V Obesity becomes #1 pharma class globally — Novo + LLY duopoly
V Wegovy + amycretin franchise reaches $50B combined by 2032
V CagriSema + amycretin dual coverage in obesity + T2D + MASH + AD
V Mim8 dominates next-gen hemophilia A; ziltivekimab opens CV-inflammation class
V Multiple expansion to peak 2024 levels (P/E 35x)

lastData.title: FY2025 DKK 309B sales (+10% CER); 2026 guidance -5% to -13% CER on China LOE + US pricing
points: GLP-1 obesity DKK 79.1B (Wegovy); GLP-1 T2D DKK 127.1B (Ozempic) + DKK 22.1B (Rybelsus)
Catalent fill-finish acquisition closed Dec 2024 ($16.5B by parent)
Oral Wegovy 25mg FDA approved Dec 22, 2025; US launch Jan 2026
CagriSema NDA filed Q4 2025 (FDA action H2 2026)
REDEFINE-1 22.7% weight loss missed 25% bull case (Dec 2024)
CEO Mike Doustdar replaced Lars Fruergaard Aug 2025

nextCatalyst.title: CagriSema PDUFA + Mim8 PDUFA + ZEUS Ph3 readout — concentrated value-driving block
thresholds: H2 2026: CagriSema FDA action (NDA filed Q4 2025)
H2 2026: Ziltivekimab Phase 3 ZEUS readout (CV/CKD inflammation)

risks: GLP-1 share war w/ LLY tirzepatide: SURMOUNT-5 H2H showed tirz +47% greater weight loss vs sema
Semaglutide composition LOE China/Brazil/Canada 2026 already cut 2026 guidance to -5% to -13% CER

Health Canada approved Dr. Reddy's generic semaglutide Apr 28, 2026 -- first formal generic; Sandoz + Apotex queued. Canadian patent lapsed 2020 (missed CAD $450 maintenance fee). Sandoz publicly using Canada as launchpad for other markets.

US semaglutide LOE 2031-2032 -- the BIG cliff. ~$25B US Ozempic+Wegovy at risk. Peptide biosimilars harder than small-molecule generics (40-50% peak penetration vs 80-90%) but Canadian/EM precedent will accelerate. Mega_bear scenario models 50% US franchise erosion.
CagriSema 22.7% missed 25% bull case (Dec 2024) — pipeline confidence damaged
Compounded GLP-1 (US shortage list de-listed Feb 2025) impacted 2024 share; 503A pharmacies still active
Catalent integration capacity ramp 2026+ — execution risk
Ziltivekimab ZEUS H2 2026 binary — new class, no precedent (CANTOS validated POC but never approved)
Stock -71% from peak; activist pressure / governance overhaul Nov 2025 (Novo Holdings still controls)
Amycretin oral path competitive vs LLY orforglipron

catalysts.title: CagriSema FDA action (PDUFA, GLP-1 + amylin combo)
catalysts._rationale: NDA filed Q4 2025 -- standard 10-month FDA review puts action Q3-Q4 2026.

catalysts.title: Mim8 (denecimig) FDA PDUFA — hemophilia A prophylaxis
catalysts._rationale: BLA submitted Sep 29, 2025; standard 10-month PDUFA target H2 2026.

catalysts.title: Ziltivekimab Phase 3 ZEUS readout (atherosclerotic CV in CKD)
catalysts._rationale: Q4 2025 call confirmed ZEUS readout H2 2026. High-risk binary; new CV-inflammation class.

catalysts.title: Amycretin Phase 3 obesity initiation (early 2026)
catalysts._rationale: Q4 2025 call confirmed Phase 3 initiation early 2026.

catalysts.title: REDEFINE-3 CagriSema CV outcomes readout
catalysts._rationale: Long-duration CV outcomes trial; 2027+ readout uncertain.
